_meta.sigma_0p5_0p3_status: NOT in cached pool (parallel GPU re-collection); excluded
_meta.vocal_presence_typematch_axis: PLANNED / deferred -- not measured; label (c) is a PROXY, not a real type-match label
_meta.leak_guard: no final_*/label_final*/final_rank* keys used as features (asserted)
_meta.split: prompt-level; dev=train, held_out=eval; a prompt's 8 candidates never split
_meta.evidence_honesty: offline analysis on existing cached data; no real ADSR/EVPD/restart result generated. Near-tied candidates cap label signal and therefore cap every AUC below.

labels.a_semantic_fit_bottom_quartile: final_semantic_fit in bottom 2 of 8 within prompt (~25%)
labels.b_lyric_low_abs_lt0p5: final_lyric_intelligibility < 0.5 on vocal_scorable (zero-inflated axis -> absolute threshold)
labels.b_lyric_bottom_half_within: within-prompt bottom-half lyric on vocal_scorable prompts WITH variation (secondary view)
labels.c_lyric_prompt_mismatch_PROXY: bottom-half final semantic_fit AND final lyric<0.5 within prompt, vocal_scorable (PROXY; no measured type-match label)
